member.name: M:FaunaConnect2.App.Services.SpatialService.IsPointInPolygon(System.Double,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.List{FaunaConnect2.App.Models.CoordinateDto})
member.summary: Checks if a point is inside a polygon using the Ray Casting algorithm.

member.name: M:FaunaConnect2.App.Services.SpatialService.CalculateDistance(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Calculates the distance between two points in meters using the Haversine formula.

member.name: M:FaunaConnect2.App.Services.SpatialService.IsWithinRadius(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Checks if a point is within a certain radius of another point.
